name: ClusterListEntry
description: Contains a cluster's state, a cluster's ID, and other important information.

allOf.description: The 39-character ID for the cluster that you want to list, for example CID123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426655440000.
The current state of this cluster. For information about the state of a specific node, see JobListEntry$JobState.
The creation date for this cluster.
Defines an optional description of the cluster, for example Environmental Data Cluster-01.
